highlights.title: Pani Puri & Dahi Puri
highlights.description: Crispy puris with spiced potatoes and tangy tamarind.

highlights.title: Samosa Chaat
highlights.description: Crushed golden samosas with fresh yogurt, mint, and sev.

highlights.title: Chana Bhatura
highlights.description: Spiced chickpea curry served with fluffy fried bread.

highlights.title: Chicken Biryani
highlights.description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with tender chicken.

highlights.title: Lamb Rogan Josh
highlights.description: Tender lamb in a rich, deeply spiced tomato gravy.

highlights.title: Warm Gulab Jamun
highlights.description: Soft milk dumplings in a fragrant cardamom syrup.
